rationale.R1.2: A load-bearing logical contradiction is present regardless of delegation intent: CALIGRA's ECE (0.094 in-dist, 0.137 OOD) is higher than the uncalibrated baseline (0.058 in-dist, 0.108 OOD) on both evaluation splits. The inference chain from evidence to conclusion is inverted.
